name: codex-communication-logger
description: Telemetry and training corpus logger for Codex CLI

interface.shortDescription: Ensures every local action is structured and logged safely.
interface.longDescription: Captures Codex session, prompt, tool, and stop events through low-latency hooks, then writes them to a local telemetry buffer for offline ingestion and export.
defaultPrompt: Check whether Codex telemetry is being captured.
